revision.text:
local p
function p.main () local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle().getContent() local offsets = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) lead = string.sub(contnet, 1, offsets[1]) return lead end

revision.comment: Galobtter moved page [[Module:Sandbox/Galobtter/IsInLead]] to [[Module:IsInLead]] without leaving a redirect: wow
Galobtter moved page [[Module:IsInLead]] to [[Module:Is infobox in lead]] without leaving a redirect: mv

revision.text:
local p = {}
function p.main (frame) p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then iter = string.gmatch(lead, "[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes, then don't return true return "true" end end end end
return p

local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then iter = string.gmatch(lead, "[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes, then don't return true return "true" end end end end
return p

revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Is infobox in lead]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then iter = string.gmatch(lead, "[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes, then don't return true return "true" end end end end
return p

revision.comment: fix the case of two of an infobox in the same article
revision.text:
local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then local lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then local iter = string.gmatch(lead, "[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes in the lead, then don't return true local iter2 = string.gmatch(content, searchString) --if able to find two of the specific infobox in the article, then return true iter2() if not iter2() then return true end end end end end
return p

local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then local lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then local iter = string.gmatch(lead, "[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes in the lead, then don't return true local iter2 = string.gmatch(content, searchString) iter2() if not iter2() then --if able to find two of the specific infobox in the article, then don't return true return true end end end end end
return p

revision.comment: fix spurious finding of duplicate infobox
revision.text:
local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then local lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then local iter = string.gmatch(lead, "{{%s-[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes in the lead, then don't return true local iter2 = string.gmatch(content, searchString) iter2() if not iter2() then --if able to find two of the specific infobox in the article, then don't return true return true end end end end end
return p

local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then local lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then lead = lead :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobox%s-mapframe", "") --don't check for infobox mapframe :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobo[^}]-%|%s-embed%s-=%s-yes", "") --don't check for embeded infoboxes :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobo[^}]-%|%s-child%s-=%s-yes", "") --don't check for child infoboxes local iter = string.gmatch(lead, "{{%s-[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes in the lead, then don't return true local iter2 = string.gmatch(content, searchString) iter2() if not iter2() then --if able to find two of the specific infobox in the article, then don't return true return true end end end end end
return p

local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then local lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then lead = lead :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobox%s-mapframe", "") --don't check for infobox mapframe :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobo[^}]-%|%s-embed%s-=%s-yes", "") --don't check for embeded infoboxes :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobo[^}]-%|%s-child%s-=%s-yes", "") --don't check for child infoboxes local iter = string.gmatch(lead, "{{%s-[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes in the lead, then don't return true local iter2 = string.gmatch(content, searchString) iter2() if not iter2() then --if able to find two of the specific infobox in the article, then don't return true return true end end end end end
return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 27 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Is_infobox_in_lead]]
revision.text:
local p = {}
function p.main (frame) return p._main (frame.args[1]) end
function p._main (searchString) local content = mw.title.getCurrentTitle():getContent() local offset = string.find(content, "==", 1 , true) if offset then local lead = string.sub(content, 1, offset-1) if (string.find(lead, searchString)) then lead = lead :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobox%s-mapframe", "") --don't check for infobox mapframe :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobo[^}]-%|%s-embed%s-=%s-yes", "") --don't check for embeded infoboxes :gsub( "{{%s-[Ii]nfobo[^}]-%|%s-child%s-=%s-yes", "") --don't check for child infoboxes local iter = string.gmatch(lead, "{{%s-[Ii]nfobox") iter() if not iter() then --if able to find two infoboxes in the lead, then don't return true local iter2 = string.gmatch(content, searchString) iter2() if not iter2() then --if able to find two of the specific infobox in the article, then don't return true return true end end end end end
return p
